title: The mistakes of mortality
subtitle: the simple story from a simple man
author: SPL Media Team

body.text: A wise man once came to me to lend council.
The world was going to rule me
I reflected upon this for but a moment. Then as the moment passed he added on that I was, and I quote
not the sharpest tool in the shed
Then a young woman arrived, hand outstretched, and her hand? Holding out her pointer finger and her thumb. Shaped like the letter "L" held up to her forehead.
